products.name: Dhokla Premix
products.desc: Extra soft, spongy dhoklas with an authentic taste — steam and serve in under half an hour.
recipe: Take 1 cup premix in a bowl, add 1 cup water and mix well (no lumps).
Temper with mustard seeds and curry leaves, and serve hot.

products.name: Dal Batti Premix
products.desc: Pure Maharashtrian dal-batti taste — crispy on the outside, soft inside, best with hot dal and ghee.
recipe: Mix 2 cups premix with 2 tbsp hot ghee and enough lukewarm water to make a firm dough.
Deep-fry until golden brown and crispy.
Lightly crack the hot battis, drizzle with pure ghee, serve with hot dal or amti.

products.name: Idli Pith
products.desc: Soft, fluffy idlis in minutes — just add curd, water and a short rest. No fermentation guesswork.
recipe: Mix 2 cups of premix with 1 cup curd, 1 cup water and salt.
Just before steaming, add 1 tsp Eno or soda, mix gently, pour into greased moulds.

products.name: Multigrain Thalipith Bhajni
products.desc: Authentic Maharashtrian thalipith with six wholesome grains — a hearty, savoury breakfast in every bite.
recipe: Mix 2 cups Thalipith Bhajni with chopped onion, coriander, salt, chilli powder, turmeric and a pinch of hing.
Add lukewarm water, knead into a soft dough, rest for 10 minutes.
Pat into a thin thalipith, make 3–4 holes, place on a lightly oiled medium-hot tawa.
Drizzle oil, cover and cook both sides until golden brown.
Serve hot with curd, butter, pickle or chutney.

reviews.text: The idli premix makes incredibly soft idlis every single time.

reviews.text: We started keeping Palvi Delights in our grocery shop. Customers love the Dhokla Premix.

reviews.text: Excellent quality. Looking forward to more products.
